author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.3 "The Lethe Below the Living" Special Program
The Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.3 "The Lethe Below the Living" Special Program will be officially released on 2026/05/22 at 19:30 (UTC+8).

"A passerby seeking a final resting place, a traveler bearing admonitions, people journey to the end of the painting where the ancient Lethe flows, stand witness to past joys and sorrows that emerge from within..."

This Special Program will feature character introductions for Mortenax Blade as well as the latest information and rewards in Version 4.3.

#HonkaiStarRail #HSRSpecialProgram
